category: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
description: Insecure use of external calls refers to vulnerabilities that arise when calling external contracts without proper validation or safeguards. This can lead to: - Unauthorized actions by malicious actors. - Loss of funds or data. - Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the called contract.
name: Insecure Use of External Calls
remediation: - **Validate targets:** Ensure the target contract is trusted and secure. - **Use secure libraries:** Leverage well-audited libraries for external calls. - **Test thoroughly:** Conduct extensive testing to ensure external calls are secure.
